simple_types.name: MMR_IADRSZ_Field
simple_types.code:
type MMR_IADRSZ_Field is
   NONE,
   Val_1_BYTE,
   Val_2_BYTE,
   Val_3_BYTE)
  with Size => 2;

fields.name: ENDRX
fields.description: Write-only. End of Transmit Buffer Interrupt Disable

fields.name: ENDTX

fields.name: RXBUFF
fields.description: Write-only. Transmit Buffer Empty Interrupt Disable

fields.name: TXCOMP
fields.description: Read-only. Receive Holding Register Ready (automatically set / reset)

fields.name: RXRDY
fields.description:
Read-only. Transmit Holding Register Ready (automatically set /
reset)

fields.name: SVACC
fields.description: Read-only. General Call Access (clear on read)

fields.name: ARBLST
fields.description: Read-only. Clock Wait State (automatically set / reset)

fields.name: SCLWS
fields.description: Read-only. End Of Slave Access (clear on read)
